{{Quote|Birth records indicate that Han's paternal ancestry goes back to Berethron e Solo, who introduced democracy in the Corellian empire.|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="TCoPL">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>}}
The '''Corellian empire''' was a political regime that existed during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] era and governed the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] for most of its history. It encompassed in reality different government systems over time that evolved from a galaxy-spanning empire to a hereditary monarchy, and later to a constitutional monarchy.<ref name="SoF" /> The Corellian empire was ruled by a [[King/Legends|King]] from the [[Solo family/Legends|House of Solo]].<ref name="TCoPL" /> However, the implication of the Corellian monarchs in affairs of the state has varied wildly throughout history.<ref name="TOR">{{TORcite|type=codex|Corellian Government}}</ref> The last ruler, King [[Berethron e Solo]], initiated democratic reforms in the empire's political system<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and eventually dissolved the monarchy in [[312 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" /> Berethron e Solo instituted a [[Corellian republic|republic]] that unfortunately evolved into a corporatocracy under the [[Diktat]]s.<ref name="SoF" /> Centuries after the reign of Berethron e Solo, [[Korol Solo]] of the House of Solo claimed to be the heir to the Corellian throne.<ref name="TNEGtC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> A few generation later, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was also considered as a descendant of Berethron e Solo.<ref name="TCoPL" />
